## Security (OWASP checklist)

For PRs touching auth, APIs, data, infra, or dependencies — complete the **[Quick PR checklist](https://github.com/infantex-team/.github/blob/main/security-checklist.md#quick-pr-checklist)**.

- [ ] Access control verified server-side
- [ ] Input validated at trust boundaries
- [ ] No secrets in code or commits
- [ ] Security-negative test case added (or N/A with reason)
